name: Peet Limited
analysis: PPC has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 22% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$1.6900, stop A$1.5939, target A$1.9600 (2.81:1) — then trail it.
